full_text:
Xi Zhen (Wenxiang) 習禎 (文祥)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Zhen (習禎), styledWenxiang (文祥), was born in Xiangyang commandery. Skilled in rhetoric, he was comparable to Pang Tong, held civil posts under Liu Bei. Xi Zhen was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
